name: todo-app
description: Daily todo app — runs the backend and frontend dev servers together

scripts.dev: (cd todo-backend && bun run dev) & (cd todo-frontend && bun run dev) & wait
scripts.build: cd todo-backend && bun run typecheck && cd ../todo-frontend && bun run build
scripts.typecheck: cd todo-backend && bun run typecheck && cd ../todo-frontend && bun run typecheck
scripts.install:all: cd todo-backend && bun install && cd ../todo-frontend && bun install
